headlines.headline: Pleven Trading Co sees 7% margin improvement in latest quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A 7% margin improvement indicates stronger operational efficiency and profitability for the company.

sentiment.reasoning: Regulatory reviews of core infrastructure create significant operational risk and potential for future penalties.

sentiment.reasoning: An 18% margin improvement is a substantial positive indicator of enhanced profitability and operational performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
